title: Payroll
name: Name
fileMustContain: File must contain at least one header row and one data row
uploadValidFile: Please upload a valid CSV or Excel file
uploadCsvFiles: Upload CSV files to process bulk employee payments
uploadCsvOrExcel: Upload a CSV or Excel file containing employee information and payment amounts
clickToUpload: Click to upload or drag and drop
requirementsDescription: Download the template or ensure your sheet uses the exact header names below. Reference numbers are automatically generated for each employee.
requirementsRequired: Required columns: First Name, Last Name, Position, Amount, Email, Currency, Phone, Payment Channel.
requirementsOptional: Optional columns: Network, Mobile Number, Bank Name, Bank Account No, Bank Branch. Use Mobile Number when Payment Channel is MOBILE_MONEY. Use Bank fields when Payment Channel is BANK.
requirementsNotes: Tips: • Payment Channel accepts MOBILE_MONEY or BANK. • For MOBILE_MONEY include Network (MTN, TELECEL, or AIRTEL-TIGO) and Mobile Number. • For BANK include Bank Name, Bank Account No, and Bank Branch. • Amount should be numeric only (no currency symbols). • Reference is auto-generated, no need to include it.
fileUploadedParsed: File uploaded and parsed successfully! {{count}} employees ready for payment.
payrollProcessedSuccess: Payroll processed successfully! {{count}} employees paid total of GH₵{{amount}}
payrollProcessedAllEmployees: Payroll processed successfully for all employees!

validationErrors.amountRequired: Valid Amount is required (must be greater than 0)
validationErrors.emailInvalid: Email must be a valid email address
validationErrors.phoneInvalid: Phone number must be valid (at least 7 digits)
